name: Wee Wee's Super Booster
description: A Pangolin heal shield dropped by King Wee Wee. Grants +15% max health and passive health regeneration similar to the Panacea. The health boost and regen let you treat health as a recoverable buffer alongside your shield.

special.description: Increases max health by 15% and provides continuous health regeneration at a rate matching the Tediore Panacea.
